description: Triggered when the user wants to optimize content for AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google AI Overviews, or get cited as a source in AI-generated answers.
should_trigger: How do I optimize my content to appear in Google AI Overviews?
We want to get cited by ChatGPT and Perplexity for our key queries
Help me with GEO — generative engine optimization for our SaaS
How do I check if our brand appears in AI search results?
Should I allow GPTBot and ClaudeBot to crawl our site?
How do I structure content so AI systems can extract it as answers?
What schema markup helps AI systems understand my content better?
should_not_trigger: How do I improve my Google PageSpeed score?
Write a blog post about project management
Help me build backlinks for my SaaS website
What are the best meta tags for traditional SEO?
